articles.title: Giant Leaves Gladiators Show
articles.summary: Jamie Bigg, known as Giant, is a big and strong man who was on a TV show called Gladiators. He has left the show after three seasons. He told his fans on Instagram that being a Gladiator was a great honor. He said he had to make a choice that didn't match what he believes is right. The show's team thanked him and wished him well. Giant is very tall at 6 feet 5 inches and has big muscles. He used to be a firefighter and a bodybuilder. He eats a lot of food every day to stay strong. Giant will not be on the show next season, but he says this is not the end for him. He wants to keep being a good role model.

articles.title: BBC Radio 1 Warns: Don't Buy Tickets from Touts
articles.summary: BBC Radio 1 is having a big music party called the Big Weekend. Tickets cost £45 for Saturday and Sunday. But some people are buying many tickets and selling them for a lot more money, like £622! This is called touting. Radio 1 says if you buy tickets from touts, you might not be allowed into the party. They want you to buy tickets only from the official website or Ticketmaster. The government wants to make a new law to stop people from selling tickets for too much money.

articles.title: How Does the Stock Market Affect My Money?
articles.summary: Sometimes you hear news about the stock market going up or down. The stock market is where people buy and sell parts of companies called shares. When share prices fall, it might seem like it doesn't affect you, but it can. Many people have pensions. A pension is money saved for when you stop working. If your parents or grandparents have a pension, the money in it is often used to buy shares. If share prices fall, the value of their pension can go down too. But experts say not to worry too much because pensions are for the long term. Over many years, the stock market usually grows. So even if prices fall for a while, they often go back up. That's why it's important to keep saving and not make quick decisions when prices drop.

articles.title: Paul Weller: A Granddad Who Makes Music
articles.summary: Paul Weller is a famous musician from England. He was in a band called The Jam. Now he is 67 years old and has two grandchildren. He says he is just like any other granddad. Paul is getting ready to release a new album. He likes a song by Billie Eilish called "What Was I Made For?" from the Barbie movie. He heard it a lot because his daughter loves Billie Eilish. Paul covered that song for his album. He stopped drinking alcohol and says that helps him enjoy music more. He remembers his first concert when he was a teenager. He played at a club in Woking with only 10 people watching. They complained about the noise until after bingo! Paul has a studio in Ripley where he makes music. He loves being a granddad and sharing music with his children and grandchildren.

articles.title: Lost TV Show Found: Morecambe and Wise Come Back!
articles.summary: A long-lost TV show from 1968 by the famous comedy duo Morecambe and Wise has been found! A person who worked in TV kept a copy, and now the BBC will show it again. The show is funny and fast, with jokes and sketches like a balloon dancer and a nudist camp. Professor Justin Smith, who helped find the show, says it shows the duo at their best. The show was made when they returned to the BBC after working on other TV. Even though the found copy is in black and white, it can be fixed to look better. Fans are excited to see this lost episode again. The BBC plans to broadcast it in the next few months.

articles.title: White House Says China Stealing AI Technology
articles.summary: The White House says that some companies from China are stealing AI technology from American companies. AI stands for artificial intelligence, which is when computers do smart things like talk or solve problems. The White House says these Chinese companies use a method called 'distilling' to copy AI. They pretend to be many normal users of an AI tool and then try to get secret information from it. The US government wants to help American AI companies protect their technology. A person from China's embassy in the US said that China develops its own technology and works with other countries. The US says it will do four things to stop the stealing, but it did not say exactly what they are. This is important because AI is a big part of our future, and countries want to be the best at it.
